title: Coverage 64.9% — main.go and DB error paths unexercised
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.649; tests use httptest+:memory: store, so main.go (server bootstrap) and 500-error branches in handler.go are not covered
suggestion: Optional: add a store-error fake to cover the 500 paths; main() bootstrap is conventionally left uncovered

title: json.Encode error ignored in writeJSON
suggestion: Log or ignore explicitly; harmless for these small payloads but flagged by strict linters (errcheck)

title: PUT requires full resource (title+author) rather than partial update
evidence: handler.go:handleUpdateBook validates title/author non-empty and store.go:update replaces all columns
suggestion: Acceptable PUT (full-replace) semantics; note it is not PATCH-style partial update. Not required by spec (R5)

title: TDD prompt: test-first evidenced, but per-test red/green cadence not verifiable from artifact
evidence: _agent_stdout.log narrates 'Wrote handler_test.go first ... all would have failed'; single cohesive test file precedes impl. No git history to confirm incremental red/green/refactor cycles (prompts/tdd.md)
suggestion: None — final artifact is consistent with test-first discipline; incremental cadence is inherently unobservable post-hoc
